issues.detail: Examples content is thin — commands are listed but not framed as user-request → actions → output demonstrations, and IAM/CloudWatch sections show inputs without expected outputs.
Guidelines content is absent — no do/don't advice, gotchas, or best-practices callouts anywhere.

Uses topical cookbook headings (Installation and Configuration, S3 Operations, EC2 Management, Lambda Functions, CloudWatch, IAM Management, Useful Patterns) instead of the conventional Overview/Instructions/Examples/Guidelines template. Content organization is otherwise complete.
tags array has 6 entries; library convention is 3-5.
compatibility claims linux/macos/windows but only the Linux install command is shown.
